## PR Type

- [ ] `chore` Governance/Process
- [ ] `feat` New capability
- [ ] `fix` Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` Internal restructuring
- [ ] `docs` Documentation

## Objective

Describe the goal in 1-3 lines:

- What problem is being solved?
- Why now?
- Expected user/business impact?

1. `path/...`: ...
2. `path/...`: ...
3. `path/...`: ...

## Governance Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `codex/<scope>-<goal>`
- [ ] No direct work/commit on `main`
- [ ] Commit(s) are single-intent and reversible
- [ ] High-risk changes explicitly called out
- [ ] Rollback plan is provided
